business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Building 146260000; Contents 42495000; Business Income 62590000; Coinsurance 80%; Deductible 75000
coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage part included under form CP 00 10 10 12. Policy declarations show Commercial Property premium of 424883.27.
Endorsement CP 15 08 10 12 attached; pays actual loss of Business Income due to necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration.
Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12 attached; includes Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.
Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12 attached; covers direct physical loss or damage to covered property caused by interruption of utility services including water, communication, and power supply services.
Endorsement CP 99 30 07 88 attached; coinsurance additional condition is suspended for property specified in the schedule during the declarations period.

Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12 attached; covers direct physical loss or damage to covered property caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

concerns: Schedule shows substantial insured values: Building 146260000, Contents 42495000, and Business Income 62590000.
positives: Business Income and Extra Expense coverage included.
Ordinance or Law Coverage endorsement attached.
Utility Services - Direct Damage endorsement attached.
